name: project-legibility
description: Shape, build, verify, and resume projects without losing intent, structure, or context.

interface.shortDescription: Keep project intent, structure, and context legible.
interface.longDescription: A project-centered Codex workflow for grounding intent, making structured changes, verifying outcomes, and leaving work easy to resume.
defaultPrompt: Resume this project and implement the next verified change.
Review this repository for context, structure, meaning, and documentation drift.
Leave this project verified and easy for the next agent to resume.
